stories.headline: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister Fedorov
stories.description: Fedorov's unexplained dismissal has upset Ukraine's military and civil society.

stories.headline: Why Italy’s Genoa bridge collapse led to one of its biggest criminal trials
stories.description: Eight years after 43 people were killed, judges rule in the first trial over the Genoa bridge collapse.

stories.headline: Vance says Epstein had connections to US, Israeli intelligence
stories.description: The US vice president says Epstein ‘seemed’ to be connected to elements of the ‘Israeli deep state’.

stories.headline: US strikes Iran, tanker, as Tehran hits Kuwait, Jordan: What’s the latest
stories.description: Strikes have hit closer to Tehran for the first time since the latest wave of attacks started.

stories.headline: ‘Escaping Beijing’: Why some young Chinese are quitting the capital
stories.description: A slowing economy and rising prices are making it harder for young Chinese to thrive in the city.
